metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4000
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3a and c: Double Immunofluorescence labelling shows colocalization of endogenous NECAP1 with presynaptic marker, Synaptophysin 1 in hippocampal neurons.
Figure 3b and d: Double Immunofluorescence labelling shows localisation endogenous NECAP1 adjacent to postsynaptic marker, PSD95 in hippocampal neurons.

For information on the NECAP1 antibody used, the paper links PMID: 15359277 stating that polyclonal NECAP 1 serum was raised in rabbits against a synthetic peptide containing amino acids 207-226 of the mouse NECAP 1 sequence (gi27229051). However, neither of the papers comment on antibody specificity.

The authors do not quantify the colocalisation profiles of NECAP1 with pre and postsynaptic markers, this should be considered as weak evidence.

The additional reference uses Super-resolution correlative light electron microscopy to study the Spatio-temporal dynamics of the Clathrin Mediated Endocytosis (CME) in HeLA cells. This paper was not used as the primary evidence because the experiments were conducted in a non-neuronal system.. Experimental description: Primary cultures of hippocampal neurons were obtained from postnatal day 1 or 2 (P1-P2) rat pups.
